THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTHE ELIZABETH CARE OF METROPOLITAN MOTORS DOYLE MICHAEL J DBA MIKE S MOBILE S AUTO REPAIR LEUNG MARIA DBA ORIENT ODYSSEYS HOMEFURNISHING SOENASTO PRAMONO CYNTHIA DBA AUTO DYNAMIKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE CHARLES DBA MARKET SHARE ADVERTISING $3,185.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,213.00, METROPOLITAN MOTORS $815;ORIENT ODYSSEYS $945; MIKES MOBILE AUTO $740;AUTO DYNAMIK $685.
